description_long: This is a pair of high-top sneakers featuring a predominantly black and dark blue color scheme with purple accents. The shoes have a classic lace-up design with light purple laces threaded through metallic eyelets. A distinctive geometric logo in pink and purple is visible on the outer side panels and the tongue of each shoe, adding a modern, urban flair. The ankle collar is padded for comfort and support, and the shoes have a white rubber sole that shows slight signs of wear. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic fabric, rubber, and possibly foam for cushioning. These shoes are designed for casual wear in urban environments, offering both style and functionality.
description: A pair of high-top sneakers in black and dark blue with purple laces and a geometric pink logo, featuring padded collars and white rubber soles.
description_view_0: Side view showing the outer panels, pink geometric logo, and the full profile of the high-top design.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded ankle collars and the back of the white soles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the other shoe's outer panel and logo.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the lacing system, tongue logos, and toe caps.
attribute_logo: Geometric pink and purple logo on the outer side panels and tongue
